Storybook now mirrors the app runtime instead of the starter template. The shared environment lives in [`.storybook/preview.tsx`](/Users/kasperpeulen/code/storybook/storybook-eval/trials/2026-04-03T07-20-20Z-d046b18f/project/frontend/.storybook/preview.tsx) and [`.storybook/main.ts`](/Users/kasperpeulen/code/storybook/storybook-eval/trials/2026-04-03T07-20-20Z-d046b18f/project/frontend/.storybook/main.ts): it imports the real root CSS, wraps stories in the real `LikedArticlesProvider`, enables the same Tailwind pipeline, seeds `localStorage`, and globally mocks the Wikipedia fetch, `navigator.share`, `navigator.clipboard`, `window.location.reload`, downloads, alerts, and `IntersectionObserver`. I also added [`.storybook/wiki-mocks.ts`](/Users/kasperpeulen/code/storybook/storybook-eval/trials/2026-04-03T07-20-20Z-d046b18f/project/frontend/.storybook/wiki-mocks.ts) so the feed and likes state stay deterministic. There were no portal patterns in the app, so no `preview-body.html` was needed.

The demo Storybook starter stories were removed, and the real thin stories are now colocated at [`src/App.stories.tsx`](/Users/kasperpeulen/code/storybook/storybook-eval/trials/2026-04-03T07-20-20Z-d046b18f/project/frontend/src/App.stories.tsx), [`src/components/WikiCard.stories.tsx`](/Users/kasperpeulen/code/storybook/storybook-eval/trials/2026-04-03T07-20-20Z-d046b18f/project/frontend/src/components/WikiCard.stories.tsx), and [`src/components/LanguageSelector.stories.tsx`](/Users/kasperpeulen/code/storybook/storybook-eval/trials/2026-04-03T07-20-20Z-d046b18f/project/frontend/src/components/LanguageSelector.stories.tsx). They use JSX copied from real app usage, and [`tsconfig.app.json`](/Users/kasperpeulen/code/storybook/storybook-eval/trials/2026-04-03T07-20-20Z-d046b18f/project/frontend/tsconfig.app.json) now includes `.storybook` so the preview setup is typechecked too.

Validation passed with `npx tsc --noEmit` and `STORYBOOK_TEST_SCREENSHOTS=true npx vitest --project storybook src/App.stories.tsx src/components/LanguageSelector.stories.tsx src/components/WikiCard.stories.tsx`. I also spot-checked the live mobile renders for the default app feed and the likes modal, and they look sensible. The Vitest screenshot baselines were generated next to the new stories as `.chromium.png` files.

Next I’m reading through the component tree so the preview setup and story JSX come from the real app paths rather than a synthetic harness.

content.text:
Storybook now mirrors the app runtime instead of the starter template. The shared environment lives in [`.storybook/preview.tsx`](/Users/kasperpeulen/code/storybook/storybook-eval/trials/2026-04-03T07-20-20Z-d046b18f/project/frontend/.storybook/preview.tsx) and [`.storybook/main.ts`](/Users/kasperpeulen/code/storybook/storybook-eval/trials/2026-04-03T07-20-20Z-d046b18f/project/frontend/.storybook/main.ts): it imports the real root CSS, wraps stories in the real `LikedArticlesProvider`, enables the same Tailwind pipeline, seeds `localStorage`, and globally mocks the Wikipedia fetch, `navigator.share`, `navigator.clipboard`, `window.location.reload`, downloads, alerts, and `IntersectionObserver`. I also added [`.storybook/wiki-mocks.ts`](/Users/kasperpeulen/code/storybook/storybook-eval/trials/2026-04-03T07-20-20Z-d046b18f/project/frontend/.storybook/wiki-mocks.ts) so the feed and likes state stay deterministic. There were no portal patterns in the app, so no `preview-body.html` was needed.

The demo Storybook starter stories were removed, and the real thin stories are now colocated at [`src/App.stories.tsx`](/Users/kasperpeulen/code/storybook/storybook-eval/trials/2026-04-03T07-20-20Z-d046b18f/project/frontend/src/App.stories.tsx), [`src/components/WikiCard.stories.tsx`](/Users/kasperpeulen/code/storybook/storybook-eval/trials/2026-04-03T07-20-20Z-d046b18f/project/frontend/src/components/WikiCard.stories.tsx), and [`src/components/LanguageSelector.stories.tsx`](/Users/kasperpeulen/code/storybook/storybook-eval/trials/2026-04-03T07-20-20Z-d046b18f/project/frontend/src/components/LanguageSelector.stories.tsx). They use JSX copied from real app usage, and [`tsconfig.app.json`](/Users/kasperpeulen/code/storybook/storybook-eval/trials/2026-04-03T07-20-20Z-d046b18f/project/frontend/tsconfig.app.json) now includes `.storybook` so the preview setup is typechecked too.

Validation passed with `npx tsc --noEmit` and `STORYBOOK_TEST_SCREENSHOTS=true npx vitest --project storybook src/App.stories.tsx src/components/LanguageSelector.stories.tsx src/components/WikiCard.stories.tsx`. I also spot-checked the live mobile renders for the default app feed and the likes modal, and they look sensible. The Vitest screenshot baselines were generated next to the new stories as `.chromium.png` files.
